On a rush to miss your bus, you decide to take the quickest route: through the end of a concert. While running, and not watching where you're going, you accidently bump into the main star of the band: Connor Blackwell, the bass player and head singer. And luckily, or unluckily, for you, Connor finds you hot.

*`stop and GO! →﹏←`*
